characters.name: SAMANTHA
characters.personality: Samantha appears to be a calm and composed leader who prioritizes the safety of her passengers, likely with a strong sense of responsibility and authority.
characters.appearance: As a pilot in a plane cockpit, Samantha is likely dressed in a crisp, professional flight suit, with short hair and a fit build.
characters.style_reference: 1980s thriller, bright colors, and a sense of high-tech futurism to represent the era's advancements in aviation.

dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, eyes fixed intently on the instruments.

dialogue_samples.line: "Everyone, please remain calm. We're experiencing some... unexpected maneuvers."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, jaw set in determination.

dialogue_samples.line: "Ladies and gentlemen, we're beginning our descent. Please return to your seats and—"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, a hint of a smile on his face.

characters.name: KATRINA
characters.personality: A calm and collected individual who prioritizes safety and order, but may also have a hint of authority and firmness in their demeanor.
characters.appearance: A middle-aged woman with a professional and put-together appearance, likely wearing a crisp airline uniform.
characters.style_reference: Modern commercial airliner, clean lines, and a focus on functionality.

dialogue_samples.line: "We're experiencing some turbulence, ma'am. Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Wide shot of SAMANTHA, a poised and charming flight hostess, walking down the aisle.

dialogue_samples.line: "We're going to be fine. Just stay seated and—"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Wide shot of SAMANTHA, reassuring smile on her face as she grips the seat arms.

dialogue_samples.line: "And don't forget to turn off your electronic devices."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Wide shot of SAMANTHA, poised and composed as she walks back to the front of the plane.
